prompt: third-person platformer, collect coins on floating islands

ctx_extensions.name: modules.network.send
ctx_extensions.description: Send a message to the server (or loopback in singleplayer fallback)

ctx_extensions.name: modules.network.onMessage
ctx_extensions.description: Register a handler for a server message type

ctx_extensions.name: modules.network.getSessionId
ctx_extensions.description: Returns the local player's session ID

ctx_extensions.name: modules.player.getPosition
ctx_extensions.signature: () => { x: number, y: number, z: number }
ctx_extensions.description: Returns the local player's current world position for proximity checks and camera tracking

ctx_extensions.name: modules.player.getVelocity
ctx_extensions.signature: () => { x: number, y: number, z: number }
ctx_extensions.description: Returns the local player's current velocity vector for camera smoothing

ctx_extensions.name: getIslandPositions
ctx_extensions.signature: () => Array<{ x: number, y: number, z: number, radius: number }>
ctx_extensions.description: Returns array of island center positions and radii so other modules can place objects on islands

ctx_extensions.name: getTerrainHeight
ctx_extensions.description: Returns the surface height at a given xz coordinate; returns -Infinity if over empty space (no island beneath)

events.name: coinCollected
events.payload: { coinId: string, playerId: string, position: { x: number, y: number, z: number } }

events.name: scoreUpdated
events.payload: { playerId: string, score: number, totalCoins: number }

events.name: playerRespawn
events.payload: { playerId: string, position: { x: number, y: number, z: number } }

events.name: allCoinsCollected
events.payload: { winnerId: string, finalScore: number, timeElapsed: number }

mesh_registry.description: Reusable floating island mesh (flattened cylinder/dome shape with rocky bottom), used as template for island instances
Simple capsule-based player character mesh with color tinting per player
Gold coin disc mesh with slight bevel, used as template for coin instances

client_to_server.payload: { x: number, y: number, z: number, vx: number, vy: number, vz: number, grounded: boolean }
{ x: number, y: number, z: number }

server_to_client.payload: { players: Record<string, { x: number, y: number, z: number, vx: number, vy: number, vz: number, score: number, grounded: boolean }>, coins: Array<{ id: string, x: number, y: number, z: number, collected: boolean }>, elapsed: number }
{ sessionId: string, x: number, y: number, z: number }
{ coinId: string, playerId: string, score: number }
{ winnerId: string, scores: Record<string, number>, timeElapsed: number }

gameplay_spec.win_condition: First player to collect all coins wins. In singleplayer, collect all coins to complete the level.

contract_warnings: Double-jump (max_jumps=2) requires client-side tracking; server trusts client jump count — potential cheat vector in competitive play.
getTerrainHeight returns -Infinity over gaps; player module must handle fall detection at y < fall_death_y.
Coin placement via getIslandPositions is deterministic from a seed; singleplayer fallback must use same seed logic as server for consistency.
coinCollected event is emitted locally on pickup for responsive HUD; server coinCollected message is authoritative and may reject stale pickups in multiplayer.
